feat.name: Packed with Flavor
feat.prerequisite: *Wandering Chef Dedication*; expert in *Crafting*, or Cooking Lore
feat.text: Edible morsels you create are particularly potent and bursting with flavor. When you Craft alchemical food or magical morsels that allow a saving throw, or that grants an ability that allows a saving throw, you can change its DC to your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. When a creature consumes alchemical food, magical morsels, or potions made by you, it also gains 5 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 hour. If you’re a master in Crafting, it gains 10 temporary Hit Points instead.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
